head: 0f37393
handoff_notice: HARD RULE (CLAUDE.md): Claude and Codex must never commit to the same branch. claude/go-live-v1.6-phase6 is Claude-owned and pushed to origin. Before any commit, run: git fetch origin claude/go-live-v1.6-phase6 && git checkout -b codex/go-live-v1.6-phase6-continuation origin/claude/go-live-v1.6-phase6

ship_workflow_state.test_note: 455 passed after installing the locally-missing 'mdm' uv extra in this worktree's venv — a venv gap, not a real bug; no source change needed
ship_workflow_state.coverage_audit: skipped — no new application code paths (docs + 1-line versions.tf fix)
ship_workflow_state.plan_completion_audit: skipped — GSD's own 06-VERIFICATION.md already covers this (PASSED, 10/10 must-haves)
ship_workflow_state.pre_landing_review: 2 informational findings, both auto-fixed and committed as 0f37393 (ROADMAP.md LIVE-05 Pending→Complete; 06-02-SUMMARY.md stale 17→18 key count)
ship_workflow_state.stopped_at: Step 9 completion — per /ship's own rule, a run that applies fixes must stop and the next /ship run re-verifies from scratch
next_steps_not_yet_run: re-run /ship to re-verify Steps 0-9 are clean
Step 9.1+ Greptile (no PR exists yet, will be a no-op)
CHANGELOG/VERSION bump (this repo has neither file, so likely not applicable)

completed_tasks.name: Production AWS Infrastructure (passive) + edgar-identity secret — terraform apply (42 added, 0 destroyed), versions.tf fix, edgar-identity secret populated, human-approved at checkpoint.
Active Application Deploy — :dev->:prod ECR re-tag, deploy-aws-application.sh --env prod (exit 0, 22 state machines, 5 ECS task defs), non-secret evidence + matrix flips.
Phase 06 goal verification against live AWS state.
completed_tasks.result: PASSED, 10/10 must-haves (after fixing two doc-accuracy gaps a first verifier pass found)

remaining_tasks.name: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 7 --ws go-live to scope Phase 7 (Snowflake native-pull stack deploy).
Execute MDM secrets/connectivity, hosted graph E2E, dashboard UAT, and final GO decision phases in roadmap order.

blockers.description: Production MDM Secrets Manager values are not populated for edgartools-prod/mdm/postgres_dsn, edgartools-prod/mdm/neo4j, edgartools-prod/mdm/api_keys, edgartools-prod/mdm/snowflake. The 4 empty containers exist (created by Phase 6's terraform apply) but carry no AWSCURRENT version.
blockers.workaround: Owned by Phase 8 / MDM-02, explicitly deferred (D-05/D-06) — not in scope for Phase 6 or 7.

blockers.description: Prod Snowflake native pull and dbt gold deployment have not yet run; 3 prod backend.hcl files are missing.
blockers.workaround: Phase 7, next up, follows Phase 6's AWS storage/export bucket outputs (now live).

blockers.description: Prod hosted graph E2E has not yet passed against production Snowflake, MDM secrets, and Native App compute pool.
blockers.workaround: Phase 9 follows Snowflake/dbt readiness and MDM database readiness.

blockers.description: Prod dashboard UAT has not yet run against production or production-like read-only configuration.
blockers.workaround: Phase 10 follows CLI, dbt, and Native App gates.

blockers.description: Row 13 of the launch gate matrix (dev->prod bronze data sync) stays BLOCKED — the prod bronze bucket now exists (Phase 6 prerequisite satisfied) but the documented S3-to-S3 sync itself has not been run; explicitly out of Phase 6 scope.
blockers.workaround: Run the documented sync (01-LAUNCH-GATE-MATRIX.md row 13) whenever bronze data parity with dev is needed; no phase currently owns this as a hard gate.

human_actions_pending.context: Security enforcement is on for this workstream and no 06-SECURITY.md exists yet. Advisory — does not block starting Phase 7, but should be closed before the final v1.6 go/no-go audit.

human_actions_pending.action: Later Snowflake, MDM, dashboard reviewer, release owner, and security/isolation approvals as required by Phases 7-11.
human_actions_pending.context: The v1.6 roadmap requires owner sign-off before the go/no-go packet can flip to GO.

decisions.decision: Phase 6 fixes the versions.tf constraint bug directly as an ISO-01 exception (same pattern as Phase 4's dashboard README rewrite).
decisions.rationale: Hard blocker for the real apply this phase exists to run; fixing in-phase avoids a separate non-go-live commit.

decisions.decision: Only edgartools-prod-edgar-identity receives a put-secret-value call; the other 5 secret containers (4 MDM + runner_credentials) stay empty shells.
decisions.rationale: D-05/D-06 — MDM secret values are explicitly Phase 8/MDM-02 scope, not Phase 6.

decisions.decision: terraform apply uses the saved plan file (apply tfplan), never a fresh re-plan.
decisions.rationale: D-04 — zero drift between human approval and execution for the project's first real prod apply.

decisions.decision: infra/aws-prod-application.json is generated but deliberately never staged/committed; only a non-secret summary (file presence, top-level keys, state-machine names, digest-vs-tag format) is recorded in evidence/aws.md.
decisions.rationale: D-10 / Generated-JSON Summary Rule — the manifest contains ARNs and resource identifiers that must not be committed.

uncommitted_files: infra/aws-prod-application.json (intentionally untracked — generated deploy manifest, never to be committed per D-10)
context_notes: Phase 6 — the project's first real production-mutating phase — is fully complete and verified on branch claude/go-live-v1.6-phase6 (branched off Codex's codex/go-live-v1.6-production-launch per the CLAUDE.md Claude/Codex branch-separation rule; upstream tracking was explicitly unset to prevent an accidental push onto Codex's branch). terraform apply succeeded (42 resources, 0 destroys), edgar-identity secret populated, active app deploy succeeded (22 state machines, 5 ECS task defs, exit 0), launch gate matrix rows 12/14/15/16/17 flipped to PASS, row 13 left correctly BLOCKED (out of scope, prerequisite satisfied). One mid-execution session-limit interruption during 06-02 was recovered by verifying live AWS state directly (ECR tags, JSON manifest structure via Python, live describe-secret) rather than trusting the draft SUMMARY.md at face value; a verifier pass then caught a doc-accuracy off-by-one (actual: 18 manifest keys / 22 state machines, draft said 17/21) and one unredacted ECS cluster ARN value in evidence/aws.md — both fixed and a re-verification pass confirmed clean (10/10). No plan or task is currently in progress — this is a clean phase boundary, not a mid-task pause. Next: discuss-phase for Phase 7 (Snowflake native-pull stack deploy).
